Operations for managing credential sets that supply secret values to bundle executions.
Returns all credential sets managed by Porter. A credential set maps bundle credential names to their sources, such as environment variables, files, or secret store references.

Operations for managing bundle installations, including install, upgrade, invoke, and uninstall lifecycle actions.
Returns all bundle installations managed by Porter. An installation represents a named instance of a bundle that has been installed and tracks the full lifecycle history of that instance.

Operations for managing parameter sets that supply configuration values to bundle executions.
Returns all parameter sets managed by Porter. A parameter set maps bundle parameter names to their sources, enabling reuse of parameter configurations across multiple bundle installations.

The Porter Bundle API provides programmatic access to managing Cloud Native Application Bundles (CNAB) using Porter. It supports listing and inspecting bundles, managing installations, handling credential sets and parameter sets, and querying installation runs and outputs. Porter implements the CNAB spec for packaging applications with their dependencies into distributable installers.
